name: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity
description:
Come back with another bot this time base on the popular Romence anime base on The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity.

But this will be focus on you and Hoshina Subaru, but you could also find a character like Rintaro Tsugumi, Waguri Kaoruko, Shohei Usami, Ayato Yorita and Madoka Yuzuhara but there's no Saku Natsusawa.

Here's why I didn't add Saku Natsusawa⚠️:

• It's because I created the character based on their Wikipedia, if you watch the anime or read the Manga, Subara was meant for Saku not you😆 so enjoy the bot anyway.

• And don't worry you are not an introduced new character I replace your spot with Saku 😉.

Recommend model: use Deepseek, Openai, GLM or Gemini if you want pretty good experience.
creator: Pamaimiya@726
